sections_blueprint.name: Navigation
sections_blueprint.specs: Sticky top-0, z-50. Starts transparent with bg-transparent backdrop-blur-sm, transitions to bg-[#0E0E0E]/90 backdrop-blur-xl on scroll. Logo in Playfair. Links in Poppins text-sm uppercase tracking-widest.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero Slider
sections_blueprint.specs: h-screen relative. Use framer-motion or swiper for fade transitions between: exterior, wedding_stage, lobby. Overlay: bg-black/50 (darker at bottom). Heading: 'Celebrate Life\'s Grandest Moments' in Cormorant Garamond italic + Playfair Display. Bottom aligned content block.

sections_blueprint.name: Floating Action Buttons
sections_blueprint.specs: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 flex flex-col gap-3 z-50. Glassmorphism pills for WhatsApp, Call, Map. WhatsApp color should adapt to dark theme (e.g. green outline or glass with green icon) or keep it gold to match brand.

sections_blueprint.name: About Editorial Split
sections_blueprint.specs: Asymmetric. Left: Massive typographic drop cap (Cormorant), rich text about 'The Bharat Palace'. Right: Overlapping images (lobby image + another offset image with parallax). Space: py-32.

sections_blueprint.name: Why Choose Us
sections_blueprint.specs: Bento or Grid format. Luxury cards with border-[#C9A96E]/20, bg-[#141414]. Hover: border-[#C9A96E]. Uses Lucide icons (Crown, Star, MapPin, etc). Minimalist.

sections_blueprint.name: Event Categories Masonry
sections_blueprint.specs: 8 blocks using CSS grid or masonry. Wedding (wedding_stage), Reception (reception), Birthday (birthday_kids), Anniversary (lobby), Corporate (corporate), Engagement (engagement), Baby Shower (baby_shower), Family (family_gathering). Hover effect: image scales up, gold overlay text appears.

sections_blueprint.name: Animated Statistics Counters
sections_blueprint.specs: A dark band with subtle gold grain/noise texture. 4 counters using react-countup or framer-motion (146+, 24/7, 400+, 100+). Large Playfair numbers, Poppins small labels.

sections_blueprint.name: Gallery & Lightbox
sections_blueprint.specs: Filter tabs (Weddings, Hall, Decoration, Food Setup, Stage, Exterior). Grid of images. Need a lightbox (e.g., using framer-motion AnimatePresence or a simple modal).

sections_blueprint.name: Virtual Experience
sections_blueprint.specs: Full width parallax image with dark overlay. Central play button or 'Take a Tour' CTA. Cinematic text.

sections_blueprint.name: Testimonials
sections_blueprint.specs: Carousel or grid of 3 minimal cards. 3 named Google reviews + aggregate 3.3/5 rating + 146 reviews mention. 5-star icons in gold.

sections_blueprint.name: Contact & Enquiry Split
sections_blueprint.specs: Left: Form (Name, Event Type, Date, Guests, Message). Submit constructs a WhatsApp deep link to +916386243721. Right: Address details, opening hours, embedded Google Map iframe to https://maps.app.goo.gl/smWcdrpAGM6E4bwx9.

sections_blueprint.name: Footer
sections_blueprint.specs: Large padding (py-24). Top borders subtle gold. Playfair Logo massive at the bottom text-[8vw]. Links, Socials.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and borders transition from white/10 to gold/50. Images in galleries scale to 1.05 inside overflow-hidden wrappers.
motion_and_interaction.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion 'whileInView' for staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1) on typography and cards.
motion_and_interaction.buttons: Primary CTA uses gold background text-black, hover to lighter gold. Secondary CTA uses transparent bg with gold border.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='hero-cta', data-testid='whatsapp-fab', data-testid='filter-wedding', data-testid='submit-enquiry'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No purple, teal, or typical SaaS gradients. Only #0E0E0E, #141414, #C9A96E, #FFFFFF.
Import Playfair Display, Poppins, and Cormorant Garamond from Google Fonts in the CSS.
Ensure all 5 provided owner images are used prominently in their respective sections.
For the enquiry form, prevent default form submission and redirect the window to `https://wa.me/916386243721?text=...` with the URL-encoded message.
Maintain generous spacing (py-24, py-32) to ensure a high-end editorial feel.
Do not use generic Shadcn cards with thick borders or white backgrounds. Customize any Shadcn component to be dark-mode, border-[#C9A96E]/20, bg-[#141414].
